original text:
If you would like to work together, or just have a question or comment, let Jake know by typing out an email down below! Alternatively, you could also just chant the magic spell "magalooga poshinpoomp expudunda babookerfff Jake! Jake!! Jake!!!" to summon him, but lets face it, that's impracticle.
Find me on social media, use the form below, or hit me up via email at grumpinpumpkin@gmail.com.
